title: みんなでハッピー☆バーベキュー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On Copano Rickey's recommendation, today she
and I are visiting a national park located in a
lucky direction.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, dearie me! If it isn't Rickey and her trainer!
Fancy seeing you here.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Acute! I never imagined we'd bump into you
here!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I came here for a neighborhood association
gathering. Everyone's out and about playing
games and having a barbecue.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how about you two join us? The
neighborhood association head said we were
allowed to invite people we know.
choice_data_list: Sounds fun! Do you want to join, Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I do! Thank you for inviting us, Acute!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right, all you good girls and boys! How about
a game of tag before lunch?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'll be it, and you have to run away without being caught. Got it? Reeeady, GO!

text_block_list.name: Neighborhood Association Kids
text_block_list.text: Aaaah!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Here ya go! One grilled carrot! They're piping
hot, so be careful not to burn your mouths!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're next! You said you don't like vegetables,
but I'm sure you won't have problems if you
gobble them down with some meat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is busily grilling and handing out
skewers for all the neighborhood association
attendees. She looks to be enjoying herself, but...
choice_data_list: Hey, don't you forget to eat too!
Hey, don't you forget to eat too!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right. I'll put some food aside for
you, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I had loads of fun, grilled some meat, and
had a great time with everyone. I really soaked up
tons of good energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, haha! And I might be a teensy bit hungry too.
choice_data_list:
You were running around on an empty stomach,
after all.

You were running around on an empty stomach,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I've grilled you some meat, Rickey. There's tons
more, if you want seconds.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Here, have some tea, too. Fill your stomach and
take it easy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Don't mind if I do! The meat looks
amazi—ngh?!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Come now, drink your tea. Let me give you a
little back massage too.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to rush. The food isn't going
anywhere. Make sure you chew properly so that
you absorb the nutrients better and you don't
choke.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hehe, okaaay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is usually the one looking after
others, but when she's with Wonder Acute, it
seems the roles are reversed.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Snore...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, she fell asleep before she even finished
eating. I'll throw a blanket over her legs so that
she won't catch a cold.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Why, it's the least I can do considering
how much she helps me.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Just like you saw today, Rickey always puts others
before herself. She used to have me worried
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
But now, she has a trainer by her side to look out
for her.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Please keep watching over her, okay?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Please keep watching over her, okay?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You know how Rickey is often going on
about "generative cycles"? All that about people
being each other's support?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have no doubt that Rickey has been filled
with happiness since the moment she met you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Let's go, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she's dreaming about racing? Seeing
her peaceful sleeping face fills me with warmth.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: How dependable! I'll be able to rest easy now.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: What is it Rickey always says? Rickey, lucky, um...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I'm super happy too! Isn't that right,
Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Gehehe... Everyone's so happy... Snore...
